TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ayda a damiad mahida tu nacilaay kacaldes .pasiked kaku tulencyi , maka mitiyung sitanang tu.maydis misakalankam nika tanutanang sa, tadikudaca kubalucu' Aydaay amihca' a lalud pihaceng kacaldes caykanungnung, sisa mautang kalahukan mikuli. Lima a bataan idaw ku edem ku mihcaan nu Maku,nay tu ku angil, apahabay tu ilumaay sisa nungnung han.
S.PHON: ajda a damiad mańßida tu na ¶ir~…ĺaaj ka ¶ar~…ĺd…ôs .pasik…ôd kaku tur~…ĺ…ôn ¶ji , maka mitijuŇč sitanaŇč tu.majdis misakar~…ĺankam nika tanutanaŇč sa, tadikuda ¶a kubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ajdaaj amińß ¶a Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺud pińßa ¶…ôŇč ka ¶ar~…ĺd…ôs ¶ajkanuŇčnuŇč, sisa mautaŇč kar~…ĺańßukan mikur~…ĺi. r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku …ôd…ôm ku mińß ¶aan nu maku,naj tu ku aŇčir~…ĺ, apańßabaj tu ir~…ĺumaaj sisa nuŇčnuŇč ńßan.
S.FORM: Ayda a damiad mahida tu nacilaay kacaldes .pasiked kaku tulencyi , maka mitiyung sitanang tu.maydis misakalankam nika tanutanang sa, tadikudaca kubalucu' Aydaay amihca' a lalud pihaceng kacaldes caykanungnung, sisa mautang kalahukan mikuli. Lima a bataan idaw ku edem ku mihcaan nu Maku,nay tu ku angil, apahabay tu ilumaay sisa nungnung han.
S.PHON: ajda a damiad mańßida tu na ¶ir~…ĺaaj ka ¶ar~…ĺd…ôs .pasik…ôd kaku tur~…ĺ…ôn ¶ji , maka mitijuŇč sitanaŇč tu.majdis misakar~…ĺankam nika tanutanaŇč sa, tadikuda ¶a kubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ajdaaj amińß ¶a Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺud pińßa ¶…ôŇč ka ¶ar~…ĺd…ôs ¶ajkanuŇčnuŇč, sisa mautaŇč kar~…ĺańßukan mikur~…ĺi. r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku …ôd…ôm ku mińß ¶aan nu maku,naj tu ku aŇčir~…ĺ, apańßabaj tu ir~…ĺumaaj sisa nuŇčnuŇč ńßan.
